name: Open Telemark and Wing
preceding_figure_names: Back Whisk, Basic Weave, Contra Check, Fallaway Whisk, Open Impetus, Open Telemark, Outside Change, Turning Lock, Turning Lock to R, Weave From Promenade Position, Whisk
following_figure_names: Closed Telemark, Open Telemark, Double Reverse Spin, Progressive Chasse To R, Reverse Turn, Drag Hesitation, Fallaway Reverse And Slip Pivot, Whisk
notes:
Wing can be used from other positions.
Less turn can be made on Wing to end facing LOD.

steps.action: LF forward, DC, start to turn left, sway S, CBM, rise e/o 1
comments: Left side is axis point, stretch diagonal.

steps.action: RF to side, BDW, T, 1/4 btwn 1-2, sway L, up
LF to side and slightly forward in PP, pointing DW, body facing wall, TH, 1/2 btwn 2-3, body turns less, sway S, up, lower e/o 3
RF fwd and across in PP and CBMP, pointing to LOD, H, 1/8 btwn 3-4, sway S
comments: This is "Wing". See Open Impetus and Wing.
Wing can be used from other positions.
Less turn can be made on Wing to end facing LOD.

steps.action: RF back, BDC, TH, start to turn L, sway S, CBM, rise slightly e/o 1, NFR
comments: See "Closed Telemark" on doing heel turn.

steps.action: LF closes to RF (Heel Turn), FLOD, HT, 3/8 btwn 1-2, sway R, cont rise on 2
RF diag. fwd and slightly to R in PP, R side leading, pointing LOD, TH, slightly body turn to L, sway S, up, lower e/o 3
LF fwd in PP and CBMP, FDC, HT, 1/8 btwn 3-4, sway S, CBM, start to rise e/o 4
comments: See "Open Impetus and Wing" for Wing.
Right side leading. Head up and leftward.

steps.action: RF fwd preparing to step OP on L side, Facing Centre, T, 1/8 btwn 4-5, sway L, cont to rise on 5
comments: Right side leading. Head up and leftward.

steps.action: LF fwd in CBMP, OP on L side, facing against LOD, continue to turn to BDC, TH, 1/4 btwn 5-6, then continue to turn body to BDC, sway L, up, lower e/o 6
comments: Stay connected with Man on the wrong side.
